news.title: Trump says war in Iran is going 'swimmingly' and 'should be ending pretty soon'
news.description: President Donald Trump's latest prediction on the end of the war against Iran came hours after Israel announced a ceasefire with Lebanon.

news.title: Trump nominates Erica Schwartz as CDC director amid turmoil around leadership, vaccine policy
news.description: The CDC has been going through turmoil and several leadership shakeups under HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

news.title: Oil falls as Trump reiterates Iran war ‘should’ end soon and Israel-Lebanon truce lifts hopes
news.description: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon had agreed to a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington.

news.title: Kevin Warsh wants to lead a scandal-ridden Fed. His wealth is a complication.
news.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., is calling attention to potential issues in the Fed chair nominee's financial disclosures.

news.title: The 'debasement trade' has driven gold to new heights. Wells Fargo's bull case calls for $8,000 an ounce
news.description: "We're in the 4th debasement cycle that started in 2022," wrote Wells Fargo Securities' Ohsung Kwon.

news.title: Netflix stock sinks after streamer reiterates guidance, says Reed Hastings to exit board
news.description: Netflix beat expectations for Q1 revenue and reported a big jump in earnings per share thanks in part to a termination fee related to its proposed WBD deal.

news.title: Asia markets open lower as fragile Middle East ceasefire tempers sentiment
news.description: Asia-Pacific markets open lower Friday as an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire tempered risk appetite, even after Wall Street closed at fresh record highs.

news.title: Trump says gas prices 'not very high' as most U.S. voters blame him for price spike
news.description: Trump touted the rising stock market as he brushed off concerns that Americans are laboring under higher gas prices as a result of the Iran war.

news.title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
news.description: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.

news.title: Rising value of Pokémon cards sparks smash and grab crime spree
news.description: Small shops across the UK are being targeted by thieves stealing collectibles worth thousands of pounds.

news.title: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings to step down as chairman
news.description: Hastings set up the company in 1997, when it rented DVDs to customers and delivered by post.

news.title: No issues with UK fuel supply, says Reeves
news.description: The chancellor was speaking at the end of the International Monetary Fund meeting in Washington.

news.title: Europe has 'maybe six weeks of jet fuel left', energy boss warns
Could a digital twin make you into a 'superworker'?
news.description: Firms say digital twins make staff more productive, but are they a potential legal minefield?

news.title: UK economy grew faster than expected in February ahead of Iran war
news.description: The economy saw its biggest monthly rise in more than two years just before the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.

news.title: UK prepares for food shortages in worst case scenario as Iran war continues
news.description: The UK could face some food shortages by the summer under a worst case scenario drawn up by government officials.

news.title: Cramer warns of excessive speculation in the market. He says buy these credible stocks instead
news.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer warns that speculation is getting out of hand and points to alternative places to invest.

news.title: Here's our monthly update on all 31 portfolio stocks, including 3 on the buy list
news.description: Jim Cramer gave his latest thinking on all 31 stocks owned by the CNBC Investing Club, including Nvidia, Apple, and Microsoft.

news.title: Google will let users connect their photos to the Gemini chatbot and Nano Banana
news.description: Linking Gemini directly to a user's photo library represents a bigger step in the AI chatbot link to private information.

news.title: Quantum stocks on pace for a massive week after Nvidia debuts AI models to boost the tech
news.description: Hyperscalers Alphabet, Amazon and Microsoft have been investing heavily in chips to power quantum computing

news.title: Anthropic rolls out Claude Opus 4.7, an AI model that is less risky than Mythos
news.description: Claude Mythos Preview is Anthropic's most powerful AI model that excels at identifying weaknesses and security flaws within software.

news.title: TSMC and ASML post-earnings stock moves could be a sign of what's to come from chip companies
news.description: Two of the biggest chipmakers, TSMC and ASML, failed to catch major tail winds from strong earnings. It could be a bellwether for the chip industry as a whole.

news.title: S&P 500's all-time high, investigators visit the Fed, Allbirds' rebrand and more in Morning Squawk
news.description: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: Sens. Warren and Blumenthal investigate NLRB decision to drop charges against SpaceX for retaliatory firings
news.description: Sens. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., and Richard Blumenthal, D-Conn., are investigating the NLRB after it dropped charges against Elon Musk's SpaceX in February over retaliatory firings.
